item.title: Why is Arkade Developers Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 30-Mar, Arkade Developers Ltd witnessed a significant decline in its share price, falling 5.02% to close at ₹94.70, marking a new 52-week and all-time low of ₹93.95 during intraday trading. This drop reflects a continuation of a downward trend that has seen the stock underperform both its sector and broader market indices over multiple time frames. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Vibhor Steel Tubes Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 30-Mar, Vibhor Steel Tubes Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, closing at ₹102.00, down ₹3.20 or 3.04% from the previous session. This drop reflects a continuation of a broader downtrend that has seen the stock underperform both its sector and benchmark indices over multiple time frames. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Sanstar Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 30-Mar, Sanstar Ltd’s stock price fell sharply by 4.85% to ₹75.66, hitting a new 52-week and all-time low of ₹74.37. This decline reflects a combination of disappointing financial results, poor management efficiency, and sustained underperformance relative to market benchmarks and its sector peers. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Kronox Lab Sciences Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 30-Mar, Kronox Lab Sciences Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, closing at ₹99.00, down ₹2.75 or 2.7% as of 09:16 PM. This drop reflects a continuation of a downward trend amid disappointing returns and valuation pressures, compounded by sector weakness and subdued growth prospects. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Samhi Hotels Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 30-Mar, Samhi Hotels Ltd witnessed a significant decline in its share price, falling 4.76% to close at ₹128.05. This drop reflects a continuation of recent underperformance relative to both its sector and broader market benchmarks. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is BEML Land Assets Ltd falling/rising?

item.title: Why is Maks Energy Solutions India Ltd falling/rising?

item.title: Why is eMudhra Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 30-Mar, eMudhra Ltd’s share price has experienced a notable decline, falling 3.87% to ₹370.05 and hitting a fresh 52-week low of ₹365.75. Despite the company’s robust financial performance and healthy growth metrics, the stock has underperformed the broader market and its sector peers, reflecting a complex interplay of market sentiment and valuation concerns. Time: 5 hours ago

item.description: On 30-Mar, Harsha Engineers International Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, closing at ₹312.90, down ₹11.10 or 3.43%. This drop reflects a continuation of the stock's underperformance relative to both its sector and broader market benchmarks. Time: 5 hours ago

item.description: On 30-Mar, Prime Fresh Ltd’s stock price fell by 2.3% to close at ₹203.80, continuing a recent downward trend despite the company’s robust long-term financial performance and market-beating returns. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Bandhan Bank Ltd. falling/rising?
item.description: As of 30-Mar, Bandhan Bank Ltd. shares have fallen sharply by 5.01% to close at ₹141.25, continuing a downward trend driven by disappointing earnings, declining investor participation, and waning promoter confidence. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is The Grob Tea Co Ltd falling/rising?

item.description: On 30-Mar, Creative Newtech Ltd’s stock price fell sharply by 6.53% to ₹524.10, marking a new 52-week and all-time low. item.title: Why is Shree Digvijay Cement Co. Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 30-Mar, Shree Digvijay Cement Co. Ltd’s stock price edged up marginally by 0.25% to ₹56.39, despite hitting a new 52-week low of ₹53.86 earlier in the day. This slight rise contrasts with the broader cement sector’s decline of 2.48%, reflecting a nuanced market response amid ongoing challenges faced by the company. Time: 5 hours ago
